{{Infobox artifact
| name = Mithra
| introduced = The Crimson Vault
}}

''See also: [[Mithra Timeline]]''

== Overview ==
{{spoiler|book=tg-03-city-of-light|Mithra is the final [[sword]] created by [[Valin]] the Wanderer and serves as the thirteenth [[Dragon's Fang]]. The weapon features a slightly curved silver blade with a single sharp outer edge and a gold-wrapped hilt. A thin line of gold, which appears to be integrated directly into the [[steel]], runs from the hilt to the tip of the blade. Measuring only slightly less than seven feet in length, the [[sword]] is a powerful tool capable of slicing through solid rock and decapitating mechanical entities. Only individuals possessing the power of [[Valinhall]] are capable of wielding it. Beyond its physical utility, Mithra carries significant weight as a symbol of leadership; the person who inherits the blade also inherits the duties associated with the founder of [[Valinhall]]. While the [[sword]] has been carried by [[Valin]] and [[Kai]], it is noted that Mithra will not abandon its previous wielder.}}

== The Crimson Vault ==
{{spoiler|book=tg-02-crimson-vault|[[Forged]] by [[Valin]] the Wanderer as his finest work, Mithra is a golden [[Dragon's Fang]] featuring a silver-and-gold blade with a central core of gold. Originally wielded by the Wanderer, this thirteenth [[Dragon's Fang]] eventually chose its own heir and was later discovered by a squad of [[Damascan soldiers]]. The weapon is currently held by [[Kai]] and can only be wielded by those possessing the power of [[Valinhall]], such as the [[Valinhall Incarnation]]. During a confrontation, the [[sword]] turned aside [[Simon]] and [[Azura]], forcing [[Simon]] to knock the blade away during their fight.}}

<div class="wv-facts"><div class="wv-facts-head">Sourced facts <span class="wv-facts-count">13</span></div><div class="mw-collapsible mw-collapsed wv-facts-body">
<ul class="wv-fact-list">
<li>{{spoiler|book=tg-02-crimson-vault|[[Mithra]] is the thirteenth Dragon’s [[Fang]] and was forged by [[Valin]] the Wanderer.<ref name="tg-02-crimson-vault-c4">''The Crimson Vault'', chapter 4</ref>}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=tg-02-crimson-vault|[[Mithra]] can only be wielded by someone with the power of [[Valinhall]].<ref name="tg-02-crimson-vault-c4" />}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=tg-02-crimson-vault|[[Mithra]] is a [[sword]] held by [[Kai]].<ref name="tg-02-crimson-vault-c4" />}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=tg-02-crimson-vault|[[Mithra]] is a [[sword]] described as the Master's finest work.<ref name="tg-02-crimson-vault-c4" />}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=tg-02-crimson-vault|[[Mithra]] is a silver-and-gold blade.<ref name="tg-02-crimson-vault-c4" />}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=tg-02-crimson-vault|[[Mithra]] is a golden [[Dragon's Fang]] and the original [[sword]] of the Wanderer.<ref name="tg-02-crimson-vault-c9">''The Crimson Vault'', chapter 9</ref>}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=tg-02-crimson-vault|[[Mithra]] is a [[sword]] wielded by [[Valin]].<ref name="tg-02-crimson-vault-c10">''The Crimson Vault'', chapter 10</ref>}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=tg-02-crimson-vault|[[Mithra]] chose the thirteenth [[Dragon's Fang]] heir.<ref name="tg-02-crimson-vault-c18">''The Crimson Vault'', chapter 18</ref>}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=tg-02-crimson-vault|[[Mithra's blade]] has a core of gold running up its center.<ref name="tg-02-crimson-vault-c19">''The Crimson Vault'', chapter 19</ref>}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=tg-02-crimson-vault|[[Mithra]] is an item that a squad of [[Damascan soldiers]] stumbled in front of.<ref name="tg-02-crimson-vault-c19" />}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=tg-02-crimson-vault|[[Mithra]] turns [[Simon]] and [[Azura]] aside.<ref name="tg-02-crimson-vault-c21">''The Crimson Vault'', chapter 21</ref>}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=tg-02-crimson-vault|[[Simon]] had to knock [[Mithra]] aside during the fight.<ref name="tg-02-crimson-vault-c21" />}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=tg-02-crimson-vault|[[Mithra]] is a blade used by the [[Valinhall Incarnation]].<ref name="tg-02-crimson-vault-c21" />}}</li>
</ul>
</div></div>

== City of Light ==
{{spoiler|book=tg-03-city-of-light|Mithra is the name of the Wanderer's blade, a gold-lined [[Dragon's Fang]] [[sword]] wielded by [[Kai]]. While within [[the House]], [[Kai]] possesses the ability to banish the weapon, which is capable of communicating emotions to its wielder. After [[Kai]] laid the blade upon the ground, it was revealed that the [[sword]] was once held by the [[Eldest]] [[Nye]]. Eventually, [[Simon]] came to hold and summon Mithra, though the weapon remained quiet during this time. Feeling both eager and resigned, the [[sword]] was used by [[Simon]] to strike [[King]] [[Zakareth]].}}

<div class="wv-facts"><div class="wv-facts-head">Sourced facts <span class="wv-facts-count">13</span></div><div class="mw-collapsible mw-collapsed wv-facts-body">
<ul class="wv-fact-list">
<li>{{spoiler|book=tg-03-city-of-light|[[Mithra]] is the name of the Wanderer's blade.<ref name="tg-03-city-of-light-c1">''City of Light'', chapter 1</ref>}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=tg-03-city-of-light|[[Mithra]] is a gold-lined [[Dragon's Fang]] [[sword]] used by [[Kai]].<ref name="tg-03-city-of-light-c5">''City of Light'', chapter 5</ref>}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=tg-03-city-of-light|[[Mithra]] is a [[sword]] that [[Kai]] can banish within [[the House]].<ref name="tg-03-city-of-light-c6">''City of Light'', chapter 6</ref>}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=tg-03-city-of-light|[[Mithra]] is a blade that can communicate emotions to its wielder.<ref name="tg-03-city-of-light-c14">''City of Light'', chapter 14</ref>}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=tg-03-city-of-light|[[Kai]] laid [[Mithra]] down on the ground.<ref name="tg-03-city-of-light-c21">''City of Light'', chapter 21</ref>}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=tg-03-city-of-light|[[Mithra]] is a [[Dragon's Fang]].<ref name="tg-03-city-of-light-c23">''City of Light'', chapter 23</ref>}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=tg-03-city-of-light|[[Mithra]] is a weapon that the [[Eldest]] [[Nye]] once held.<ref name="tg-03-city-of-light-c25">''City of Light'', chapter 25</ref>}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=tg-03-city-of-light|[[Mithra]] is a [[sword]] held by [[Simon]].<ref name="tg-03-city-of-light-c25" />}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=tg-03-city-of-light|[[Mithra]] is a [[sword]] that remains quiet.<ref name="tg-03-city-of-light-c25" />}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=tg-03-city-of-light|[[Mithra]] is something [[Simon]] can summon.<ref name="tg-03-city-of-light-c27">''City of Light'', chapter 27</ref>}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=tg-03-city-of-light|[[Mithra]] felt resigned and eager.<ref name="tg-03-city-of-light-c27" />}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=tg-03-city-of-light|[[Simon]] uses [[Mithra]] to strike [[King]] [[Zakareth]].<ref name="tg-03-city-of-light-c27" />}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=tg-03-city-of-light|[[Simon]] has a [[Mithra]].<ref name="tg-03-city-of-light-c28">''City of Light'', chapter 28</ref>}}</li>
</ul>
</div></div>

== Notable quotes ==
* {{spoiler|book=tg-02-crimson-vault|“Beautiful,” he whispered. “Truly the Master’s finest work.<ref name="tg-02-crimson-vault-c4" />}}
* {{spoiler|book=tg-03-city-of-light|“You defeated me when I held Mithra,” Valin noted, ticking the point off on one finger.<ref name="tg-03-city-of-light-c25" />}}

== Notes ==
<references />

{{Traveler's Gate nav}}

[[Category:Artifacts]]
[[Category:The Crimson Vault]]
[[Category:City of Light]]
[[Category:Traveler's Gate]]
[[Category:Traveler's Gate artifacts]]
